g.text: Either<e, a> = Left e | Right a

div.p: Represents a computation that either succeeds with a value Right a or fails with an error Left e.

ul.li: Right a → unwrap a, apply f, return the result
Left e → skip f, propagate the error unchanged

g.title: Unwrap a from Right a, apply f. Result is Right b or Left e from f.
f is never called. The Left error value propagates unchanged through the chain.
Unwrap a from Right a, apply f. Result is Right b or Left e from f.
f is never called. The Left error value propagates unchanged through the chain.
